evals.name: trigger-confirm-dialog
evals.prompt: Create a reusable confirmation dialog that I can use for delete confirmations across the app.

assertions.text: Uses v-dialog with v-model, max-width, and persistent
Uses v-card with title, text, and actions slots
Uses a Promise-based pattern with defineExpose for parent usage
Accepts a color parameter for destructive actions (color='error')

evals.name: trigger-card-with-skeleton
evals.prompt: Create a card that shows a skeleton loader while data is fetched, then displays the content.

assertions.text: Uses v-skeleton-loader with an appropriate type
Conditionally renders skeleton vs content with v-if/v-else
Uses v-card for the content container

evals.name: negative-app-bar-drawer
evals.prompt: Build the app shell with a top app bar and a responsive navigation drawer.

assertions.text: Does NOT trigger vuetify-components; routes to vuetify-layout instead
